briefdescription.para: Enumerates the rendering primitives supported by the NV2A.
Palette size for palettized surfaces.
Texture unit modes.
Antialiasing settings for surfaces.
Color formats for surfaces.
Depth buffer formats for surfaces.

memberdef.name: vertex_attribute_stride_override_

memberdef.argsstring: (std::shared_ptr< FTPLogger > ftp_logger, uint32_t framebuffer_width, uint32_t framebuffer_height, uint32_t max_texture_width, uint32_t max_texture_height, uint32_t max_texture_depth=4)
memberdef.name: TestHost

memberdef.argsstring: (const uint8_t *source, uint32_t width, uint32_t height, uint32_t depth, uint32_t pitch, uint32_t bytes_per_pixel, bool swizzle, uint32_t stage=0)
memberdef.name: SetRawTexture

memberdef.argsstring: (SurfaceColorFormat color_format, SurfaceZetaFormat depth_format, uint32_t width, uint32_t height, bool swizzle=false, uint32_t clip_x=0, uint32_t clip_y=0, uint32_t clip_width=0, uint32_t clip_height=0, AntiAliasingSetting aa=AA_CENTER_1)
memberdef.name: SetSurfaceFormat

memberdef.argsstring: (SurfaceColorFormat color_format, SurfaceZetaFormat depth_format, uint32_t width, uint32_t height, bool swizzle=false, uint32_t clip_x=0, uint32_t clip_y=0, uint32_t clip_width=0, uint32_t clip_height=0, AntiAliasingSetting aa=AA_CENTER_1)
memberdef.name: SetSurfaceFormatImmediate

briefdescription.para: Returns the current surface color format.
Returns the current depth buffer format.
Changes the current depth buffer mode into float (true) or fixed integer (false).
Returns true if the current depth buffer mode is floating point.
Returns the maximum width for a texture.
Returns the maximum height for a texture.
Returns the maximum depth for a texture.
Returns the maximum size in bytes that any single texture can be.
Returns the base of texture memory.
Returns the allocated size of the entire texture memory region.
Returns the base of texture memory used by the given texture unit (stage).
Returns the base of the palette memory for an indexed texture used by the given texture unit.
Returns the width of the screen, in pixels.
Returns the height of the screen, in pixels.
Returns the width of the screen in pixels as a float.
Returns the height of the screen in pixels as a float.
Allocates a VertexBuffer large enough to hold the given number of vertices.
Sets the active vertex buffer.
Returns the active vertex buffer.

memberdef.argsstring: (uint32_t argb=0xFF000000, uint32_t depth_value=0xFFFFFFFF, uint8_t stencil_value=0x00) const
memberdef.name: Clear

briefdescription.para: Clears the active surface and pb_text overlay.

memberdef.argsstring: (uint32_t depth_value, uint8_t stencil_value, uint32_t left=0, uint32_t top=0, uint32_t width=0, uint32_t height=0) const
memberdef.name: ClearDepthStencilRegion

briefdescription.para: Sets the contents of a rect within the depth/stencil buffer.

memberdef.argsstring: (uint32_t argb, uint32_t left=0, uint32_t top=0, uint32_t width=0, uint32_t height=0) const
memberdef.name: ClearColorRegion

briefdescription.para: Sets the color of a rect within the active surface.

detaileddescription.para: Note: A number of states are expected to be set before this method is called. E.g., texture stages, shader states This is not an exhaustive list and is not necessarily up to date. Prefer to call this just before initiating draw and be suspect of order dependence if you see results that seem to indicate that settings are being ignored.

briefdescription.para: Sends vertices as an interleaved array of vertex fields. E.g., [POS_0,DIFFUSE_0,POS_1,DIFFUSE_1,...].
Sends vertices via an index array. Index values must be < 0xFFFF and are sent two per command.
Sends vertices via an index array. Index values are unsigned integers.

memberdef.argsstring: (bool allow_saving, const std::string &output_directory, const std::string &suite_name, const std::string &name, bool save_zbuffer=false)
memberdef.name: FinishDraw

briefdescription.para: Marks drawing as completed, potentially causing artifacts (framebuffer, z/stencil-buffer) to be saved to disk.
Sets the z clipping range.
Sets the active vertex shader. Pass nullptr to use the fixed function pipeline.
Returns the active vertex shader.

memberdef.argsstring: (matrix4_t &result, float fov, float z_near, float z_far) const
memberdef.name: BuildD3DProjectionViewportMatrix

briefdescription.para: Gets a Direct3D-style matrix suitable for a projection + viewport transform.
Gets a reasonable default projection matrix (fov = PI/4, near = 1, far = 200) similar to the one used by the XDK.
Returns the inverse composite matrix for the fixed function pipeline.
Set up the viewport and fixed function pipeline matrices to match a default XDK project.
Set up the viewport and fixed function pipeline matrices to match the nxdk settings.
Projects the given point (on the CPU), placing the resulting screen coordinates into result.
Unprojects a point in screenspace into 3D worldspace.
Unprojects a point in screenspace into 3D worldspace, setting Z to the given value.

detaileddescription.para: Start the process of rendering an inline-defined primitive (specified via SetXXXX methods below). Note that End() must be called to trigger rendering, and that SetVertex() triggers the creation of a vertex.

briefdescription.para: Triggers the rendering of the primitive specified by the previous call to Begin.

memberdef.argsstring: (float x, float y, float z) const
memberdef.name: SetVertex

briefdescription.para: Trigger creation of a vertex, applying the last set attributes.

memberdef.argsstring: (float x, float y, float z, float w) const
memberdef.name: SetVertex

briefdescription.para: Trigger creation of a vertex, applying the last set attributes.
Trigger creation of a vertex, applying the last set attributes.

memberdef.argsstring: (float w1, float w2, float w3, float w4) const
memberdef.name: SetWeight

memberdef.argsstring: (float x, float y, float z) const
memberdef.name: SetNormal

memberdef.argsstring: (int x, int y, int z) const
memberdef.name: SetNormal3S

memberdef.argsstring: (float r, float g, float b, float a) const
memberdef.name: SetDiffuse

memberdef.argsstring: (float r, float g, float b) const
memberdef.name: SetDiffuse

memberdef.argsstring: (float r, float g, float b, float a) const
memberdef.name: SetSpecular

memberdef.argsstring: (float r, float g, float b) const
memberdef.name: SetSpecular

memberdef.argsstring: (float s, float t, float p, float q) const
memberdef.name: SetTexCoord0

memberdef.argsstring: (int s, int t, int p, int q) const
memberdef.name: SetTexCoord0S

memberdef.argsstring: (float s, float t, float p, float q) const
memberdef.name: SetTexCoord1

memberdef.argsstring: (int s, int t, int p, int q) const
memberdef.name: SetTexCoord1S

memberdef.argsstring: (float s, float t, float p, float q) const
memberdef.name: SetTexCoord2

memberdef.argsstring: (int s, int t, int p, int q) const
memberdef.name: SetTexCoord2S

memberdef.argsstring: (float s, float t, float p, float q) const
memberdef.name: SetTexCoord3

memberdef.argsstring: (int s, int t, int p, int q) const
memberdef.name: SetTexCoord3S

briefdescription.para: Returns the current override flag to allow/prevent artifact saving.
Sets the override flag to prevent artifact saving during FinishDraw.
Sets the mask used to enable modification of various color channels during rendering.

memberdef.argsstring: (bool enable=true, uint32_t func=NV097_SET_BLEND_EQUATION_V_FUNC_ADD, uint32_t sfactor=NV097_SET_BLEND_FUNC_SFACTOR_V_SRC_ALPHA, uint32_t dfactor=NV097_SET_BLEND_FUNC_DFACTOR_V_ONE_MINUS_SRC_ALPHA) const
memberdef.name: SetBlend

briefdescription.para: Determines how pixels should be blended with existing pixels during rendering operations.
Sets the blend color (and alpha) used by the V_CONSTANT_COLOR and V_CONSTANT_ALPHA blend factors.
Sets the alpha reference value (NV097_SET_ALPHA_REF) used by NV097_SET_ALPHA_FUNC.
Sets the alpha function used to mask writes based on alpha values.

memberdef.argsstring: (int num_combiners=1, bool same_factor0=false, bool same_factor1=false, bool mux_msb=false) const
memberdef.name: SetCombinerControl

detaileddescription.para: Sets up the number of enabled color combiners and behavior flags.
same_factor0 == true will reuse the C0 constant across all enabled stages. same_factor1 == true will reuse the C1 constant across all enabled stages.

memberdef.argsstring: (int combiner, CombinerInput a, CombinerInput b=ZeroInput(), CombinerInput c=ZeroInput(), CombinerInput d=ZeroInput()) const
memberdef.name: SetInputColorCombiner

briefdescription.para: See https://github.com/abaire/nxdk_pgraph_tests/wiki/nv2a-pixel-shaders-(combiner-stages)

memberdef.argsstring: (int combiner, CombinerSource a_source=SRC_ZERO, bool a_alpha=false, CombinerMapping a_mapping=MAP_UNSIGNED_IDENTITY, CombinerSource b_source=SRC_ZERO, bool b_alpha=false, CombinerMapping b_mapping=MAP_UNSIGNED_IDENTITY, CombinerSource c_source=SRC_ZERO, bool c_alpha=false, CombinerMapping c_mapping=MAP_UNSIGNED_IDENTITY, CombinerSource d_source=SRC_ZERO, bool d_alpha=false, CombinerMapping d_mapping=MAP_UNSIGNED_IDENTITY) const
memberdef.name: SetInputColorCombiner

briefdescription.para: See https://github.com/abaire/nxdk_pgraph_tests/wiki/nv2a-pixel-shaders-(combiner-stages)

memberdef.argsstring: (int combiner, CombinerInput a, CombinerInput b=ZeroInput(), CombinerInput c=ZeroInput(), CombinerInput d=ZeroInput()) const

briefdescription.para: See https://github.com/abaire/nxdk_pgraph_tests/wiki/nv2a-pixel-shaders-(combiner-stages)

memberdef.argsstring: (int combiner, CombinerSource a_source=SRC_ZERO, bool a_alpha=false, CombinerMapping a_mapping=MAP_UNSIGNED_IDENTITY, CombinerSource b_source=SRC_ZERO, bool b_alpha=false, CombinerMapping b_mapping=MAP_UNSIGNED_IDENTITY, CombinerSource c_source=SRC_ZERO, bool c_alpha=false, CombinerMapping c_mapping=MAP_UNSIGNED_IDENTITY, CombinerSource d_source=SRC_ZERO, bool d_alpha=false, CombinerMapping d_mapping=MAP_UNSIGNED_IDENTITY) const

memberdef.name: SetOutputColorCombiner

briefdescription.para: See https://github.com/abaire/nxdk_pgraph_tests/wiki/nv2a-pixel-shaders-(combiner-stages)

memberdef.name: SetFinalCombiner0Just

briefdescription.para: See https://github.com/abaire/nxdk_pgraph_tests/wiki/nv2a-pixel-shaders-(combiner-stages)

memberdef.argsstring: (int combiner, float red, float green, float blue, float alpha) const
memberdef.name: SetCombinerFactorC0

memberdef.argsstring: (int combiner, float red, float green, float blue, float alpha) const
memberdef.name: SetCombinerFactorC1

memberdef.argsstring: (float red, float green, float blue, float alpha) const
memberdef.name: SetFinalCombinerFactorC0

memberdef.argsstring: (float red, float green, float blue, float alpha) const
memberdef.name: SetFinalCombinerFactorC1

memberdef.argsstring: (ShaderStageProgram stage_0, ShaderStageProgram stage_1=STAGE_NONE, ShaderStageProgram stage_2=STAGE_NONE, ShaderStageProgram stage_3=STAGE_NONE) const
memberdef.name: SetShaderStageProgram

detaileddescription.para: Sets the type of texture sampling for each texture.
If you have a totally blank texture, double check that this is set to something other than STAGE_NONE.

Sets the input for shader stage 2 and 3. The value is the 0 based index of the stage whose output should be linked. E.g., to have stage2 use stage1's input and stage3 use stage2's the params would be (1, 2).
Overrides the default calculation of stride for a vertex attribute. "0" is special cased by the hardware to cause all reads for the attribute to be serviced by the first value in the buffer.

briefdescription.para: Clears any previously set vertex attribute stride override for the given attribute.
Clears all vertex attribute stride overrides.
Set up the control0 register, controlling stencil writing and depth buffer mode.

detaileddescription.para: Commit any changes to texture stages (called automatically in PrepareDraw but may be useful to call more frequently in scenes with multiple draws per clear)

briefdescription.para: Saves the Z/Stencil buffer to the filesystem/.
Returns the maximum value for the current depth buffer format.
Erases the pb_text overlay.

memberdef.argsstring: (matrix4_t &matrix, const vector_t &eye, const vector_t &at, const vector_t &up)
memberdef.name: BuildD3DModelViewMatrix

briefdescription.para: Generates a Direct3D-style model view matrix.

memberdef.argsstring: (matrix4_t &result, float left, float right, float top, float bottom, float z_near, float z_far)
memberdef.name: BuildD3DOrthographicProjectionMatrix

briefdescription.para: Builds an orthographic projection matrix.

detaileddescription.para: Gets a reasonable default model view matrix (camera at z=-7.0f looking at the origin) similar to the one used by the XDK.

briefdescription.para: Toggles whether window clipping considers the rect as inclusive or exclusive.

memberdef.argsstring: (uint32_t right, uint32_t bottom, uint32_t left=0, uint32_t top=0, uint32_t region=0)
memberdef.name: SetWindowClip

briefdescription.para: Sets the window clipping region.

memberdef.argsstring: (float x, float y, float z, float w)
memberdef.name: SetViewportOffset

memberdef.argsstring: (float x, float y, float z, float w)
memberdef.name: SetViewportScale

briefdescription.para: Returns a human-friendly name for the given DrawPrimitive.

memberdef.argsstring: (const std::string &output_directory, const std::string &name, const uint8_t *texture, uint32_t width, uint32_t height, uint32_t pitch, uint32_t bits_per_pixel, SDL_PixelFormatEnum format)
memberdef.name: SaveTexture

briefdescription.para: Saves the given texture to the filesystem as a PNG file.

memberdef.argsstring: (const std::string &output_directory, const std::string &name, const uint8_t *texture, uint32_t width, uint32_t height, uint32_t pitch, uint32_t bits_per_pixel)
memberdef.name: SaveRawTexture

briefdescription.para: Saves the given region of memory as a flat binary file.
Returns the maximum possible value that can be stored in the depth surface for the given mode.
Rounds the given integer in the same way as nv2a hardware (only remainders >= 9/16th are rounded up).
Creates the given directory if it does not already exist.
Inserts a pushbuffer command to await idle.
Does a busywait.
Update matrices when the depth buffer format changes.

memberdef.argsstring: (CombinerSource a_source, bool a_alpha, CombinerMapping a_mapping, CombinerSource b_source, bool b_alpha, CombinerMapping b_mapping, CombinerSource c_source, bool c_alpha, CombinerMapping c_mapping, CombinerSource d_source, bool d_alpha, CombinerMapping d_mapping) const
memberdef.name: MakeInputCombiner

memberdef.argsstring: (CombinerDest ab_dst, CombinerDest cd_dst, CombinerDest sum_dst, bool ab_dot_product, bool cd_dot_product, CombinerSumMuxMode sum_or_mux, CombinerOutOp op) const
memberdef.name: MakeOutputCombiner

detaileddescription.para: Provides utility methods for use by TestSuite subclasses.
